title: Replay
lyrics:
3 ContributorsReplay Lyrics
I think of you in the nighttime
In the nighttime
Nighttime, nighttime

I can't erase all of the places that we've been
All of the songs all of the memories where we began, huh
My mind still remains the same
So yes, still your words replay
Even in your mistakes, I remained

So stay
(Begging)
But you don't have to leave
(Begging)
No, you don't have to leave

I can't erase all of the places that we've been
All of the songs all of the memories where we began, huh
My mind still remains the same
So yes, still your words replay
Even in your mistakes, I remained

So stay

So stay
(Begging)
But you don't have to leave
(Begging)
No, you don't have to leave
But you don't have to leave
No, you don't have to leave
